headline: Amcor Berry Deal Reshapes Packaging Leader And Puts Synergies In Focus
summary: Amcor (NYSE:AMCR) has completed its acquisition of Berry Global, creating a leading consumer packaging company. Management is highlighting expected cost and operating synergies from combining the two businesses. The deal materially changes Amcor's scale and competitive position in global packaging markets. For investors watching NYSE:AMCR, this deal marks a shift from recent attention on share price moves to a change in the underlying business. The stock closed at $41.16, with a 7 day...
